summary: The diff implements nearly all requirements of the build request. All major frontend sections (Hero, About, Services, Portfolio, Pricing, WhyChooseMe, Contact, Navigation, Footer, WhatsApp button) are present, along with the backend Motoko actor. However, the backend uses a non-stable list variable without the 'stable' keyword, the admin query method is named 'getAllInquiries()' instead of the specified 'getInquiries()', the footer uses a dynamic year instead of the hardcoded '2024', and the generated image files are omitted from the diff so cannot be confirmed.

missing_requirements.requirement: Backend actor stores inquiry records in stable storage; getInquiries() query method returns all stored inquiries.
missing_requirements.reason: The backend uses 'let inquiriesList = List.empty<Inquiry>()' without the 'stable' keyword so data will not persist across canister upgrades. Additionally the method is named 'getAllInquiries()' not 'getInquiries()' as specified.

missing_requirements.requirement: Footer copyright text must read '© 2024 Debraj Paul. All rights reserved.'
missing_requirements.reason: The footer uses 'new Date().getFullYear()' for a dynamic year rather than the hardcoded '2024' specified in the requirement.

missing_requirements.requirement: Generate and serve portfolio thumbnail images and avatar from frontend/public/assets/generated.
missing_requirements.reason: The actual image files (portfolio-gym.dim_600x400.png, portfolio-lawyer.dim_600x400.png, portfolio-coaching.dim_600x400.png, avatar-debraj.dim_400x400.png) are listed as omitted files in the diff so it cannot be confirmed they were generated and placed in the correct directory.

hallucinated_features.description: An extra 'Need Something Custom?' CTA card was added as a sixth card in the Services section grid.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request only specifies 5 service cards. This additional custom CTA card was not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: A pre-filled WhatsApp message is appended to the WhatsApp URL: '?text=Hi Debraj, I'd like to discuss a website project!'
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request only specifies the base URL https://wa.me/918730818101 without any pre-filled message text.

hallucinated_features.description: Footer includes a caffeine.ai attribution link with UTM tracking.
hallucinated_features.reason: No such attribution or UTM tracking was requested in the build request.

hallucinated_features.description: A separate Services quick-link list was added to the footer alongside the navigation links.
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-11 only specifies copyright text and quick links to all sections; a separate services list in the footer was not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Skill tags (React, Responsive Design, SEO Basics, WhatsApp Integration, Fast Delivery) and an 'Available for Projects' floating badge were added to the About section.
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-4 only specifies the bio text, profile photo placeholder, and a CTA button. Skill tags and availability badge were not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Trust stat indicators (48hrs, starting price, 100% Mobile Optimized) were added below the CTA buttons in the Hero section.
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-3 does not specify any stats or trust indicators below the CTA buttons in the Hero section.

hallucinated_features.description: A CTA banner was added at the bottom of the WhyChooseMe section.
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-8 only specifies 5 benefit points with icons in a clean layout; an additional CTA banner was not requested.
